entries.definition: an outline or side view of a person's face or head
entries.exampleSentence: In silhouette, she could see his sharp profile against the sunset.

entries.definition: a short description of a person, organisation, or thing, giving the most important details
entries.exampleSentence: The police have built up a detailed profile of the suspect.

entries.definition: the degree of public attention that someone or something receives
entries.exampleSentence: The charity has raised its profile significantly through social media campaigns.

entries.definition: a personal page or account on a social media platform
entries.exampleSentence: I updated my LinkedIn profile to reflect my new job.

entries.definition: to describe or give a summary of someone or something
entries.exampleSentence: The magazine profiled ten young entrepreneurs who are changing the industry.
